name: 13q12_3_SACS_SD
description: SACS (sacsin, ARSACS spastic ataxia of Charlevoix-Saguenay) at 13q12.12 is flanked by small directly-oriented SDs (5-15 kb at 93-96% identity) that contribute to rare intragenic deletions. SACS is a >700 kb gene with a single 12.8 kb mega-exon highly enriched for Alu repeats, an additional fragility factor.

architecture.internal_structure: 5-15 kb SDs flanking SACS; intragenic Alu-Alu pairs within the 12.8 kb mega-exon drive small deletions.

related_diseases: ARSACS (autosomal recessive spastic ataxia of Charlevoix-Saguenay)
